summary.intent: Investigate and implement a [crm] config section in the MoltisConfig schema for the CHA-14 Linear issue, following existing CalDav/Cron patterns.
summary.outcome: Successfully implemented CrmConfig struct in schema.rs, added schema map entry and semantic validation in validate.rs, added a commented [crm] template section in template.rs, added 5 new unit tests (160 total passing), and committed the changes on a feature branch.

repo: Config changes require touching 4 files: schema.rs (struct definition + MoltisConfig field), validate.rs (build_schema_map + check_semantic_warnings), and template.rs (commented TOML section).
The moltis-crm crate defines a PracticeArea enum with 9 variants: corporate, employment, family_law, immigration, intellectual_property, litigation, real_estate, tax, other.
The gateway gates CRM behind #[cfg(feature = "crm")] but config structs should always be present and deserialize to defaults when the section is absent.
CalDavConfig and CronConfig are the canonical reference patterns for new config sections — use #[serde(default)] and implement Default.
build_schema_map() in validate.rs must be updated alongside schema.rs to keep schema validation in sync with struct definitions.
check_semantic_warnings() in validate.rs is where enum-constrained string fields (like default_practice_area) are validated against allowed values.

code.finding: MoltisConfig struct definition — crm field added after webhooks, before env.
build_schema_map() — add Struct(HashMap::from([...])) entry for 'crm' here alongside caldav/cron/webhooks.
check_semantic_warnings() — location for default_practice_area validation against PracticeArea enum variants.
Default config template — [crm] section inserted after channels/hooks, before env.

workflow: Run cargo check/test on the specific crate (not workspace-wide) to avoid noise from unrelated build failures like missing generated assets.
The nightly rustfmt pinned version must be used for format checks — standard cargo fmt may not match CI.
Test count is a useful sanity check: baseline was 155 tests, after adding CRM validation tests it became 160.

friction: LINEAR_API_KEY was not set in the agent environment, blocking all Linear API calls — investigation summary and workpad could not be posted as required by the workflow.
Pre-existing build failure: missing crates/web/src/assets/style.css caused cargo check to fail at the workspace level; required scoping checks to the specific crate.
validate.rs is very large (2600+ lines), requiring multiple paginated reads to locate the right insertion points for build_schema_map and check_semantic_warnings.
The same file (schema.rs and validate.rs) was read multiple times across the session due to the large file size and need to find specific sections.
open_items: Gateway wiring not done — server.rs currently only calls run_migrations(); future work needs to read config.crm to instantiate/configure SqliteCrmStore.
The missing style.css build failure is a pre-existing issue unrelated to CRM; it needs: cd crates/web/ui && npx tailwindcss -i input.css -o ../src/assets/style.css --minify.
Semantic validation of default_practice_area could be skipped when the crm feature flag is off — currently always validated.
Investigation and workpad comments were never posted to Linear due to missing API key — this gap in the orchestration workflow needs a fix.
PR creation was not confirmed in the transcript — the session ends at git commit staging, so the PR may not have been created/linked to Linear.
